item.name: Urn of Shadows

unique_modifier.description: Grants an additional charge for every 5 minutes of game time.
unique_modifier.effect: Additional charges are gained over time.

usage_notes: Grants a stack of bonus HP, which can be activated to deal damage and apply an Amplify Damage debuff.
Stacks grant health but do not affect the hero's current health pool.
The item also provides mana regeneration proportional to stacks.
